info.name: Atlassian Admin API
info.description:
The Atlassian Admin API provides programmatic access to manage Atlassian organizations, users, domains, policies, and events. It enables administrators to automate organization management tasks, integrate with identity providers, and ensure appropriate access to Atlassian products.

Contact Support:
 Name: Atlassian Developer

(Required) The unique identifier of the user.

request.description: Grants a user access to organization products by assigning roles.

query.description: Filter events from this date-time (ISO 8601 format). Returns events that occurred on or after this time.
Filter events up to this date-time (ISO 8601 format). Returns events that occurred on or before this time.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the organization.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of events for the organization. Events represent audit trail entries for actions performed within the organization, such as user changes, policy updates, and access modifications.

response.name: Successful response containing a paginated list of events.
